home.request-permission-dialog-title: Request permission to view artist data
home.request-permission-dialog-descripti: Please search by the official name. The search results can be scrolled. If you don't hit it well, try changing the upper and lower case letters, entering only the initials and scrolling to find it. If you still can't find it, please contact the office.

concierge.welcome: Hello! I'm the concierge. If you have any questions, feel free to ask!
concierge.notion: This feature is experimental and may not be accurate in its answers or content. Please be aware of this. Accuracy will improve in future updates.

offer.offer-creation-notion: Users who hold 20 FSP or more can create an Offer
offer.offer-info: OFFERS allows artists to find and recruit for tasks that can support them in their musical activities.
offer.find-offer-guide: You can find recruiting Offers by clicking the magnifying glass icon in the upper right corner of the screen.
